mapper.select: select count(*) from LEARNING_SCHEDULER ls INNER JOIN TEMPLATE t ON t.ID = ls.TEMPLATE_ID INNER JOIN HC_MEMBER hm ON ls.REG_ID = hm.MEM_ID LEFT JOIN LEARNING_DATA ld ON ld.SCHED_ID = ls.SCHED_ID LEFT JOIN LEARNING_MODEL lm ON lm.LEARNING_ID = ld.ID

select
, t.TEMPLATE_NAME , hm.MEM_NAME as regNm , t.HDQR_BOB_DCD , t.LEARNING_TYPE from LEARNING_SCHEDULER ls INNER JOIN TEMPLATE t ON t.ID = ls.TEMPLATE_ID INNER JOIN HC_MEMBER hm ON ls.REG_ID = hm.MEM_ID
ORDER BY ls.REG_DT
ASC
DESC

select
, t.TEMPLATE_NAME , ls.EPOCH , ls.LEARNING_RATE , ls.BATCH_SIZE from LEARNING_SCHEDULER ls INNER JOIN TEMPLATE t ON t.ID = ls.TEMPLATE_ID INNER JOIN HC_MEMBER hm ON ls.REG_ID = hm.MEM_ID -- LEFT JOIN LEARNING_DATA ld ON ld.SCHED_ID = ls.SCHED_ID -- LEFT JOIN LEARNING_MODEL lm ON lm.LEARNING_ID = ld.ID where ls.DEL_AT = 'N' and ls.SCHED_ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into maummcc.LEARNING_SCHEDULER (SCHED_NM, HDQR_BOB_DCD, TERM_TY, ST_YMD, ST_TIME, USE_AT, REG_ID, REG_DT, MOD_ID, MOD_DT, DEL_AT, TEMPLATE_ID, DES, EPOCH, LEARNING_RATE, BATCH_SIZE, SEARCH_MM) values (#{schedNm}, #{hdqrBobDcd}, #{termTy}, #{stYmd}, #{stTime}, #{useAt}, #{regId}, current_timestamp(), #{modId}, current_timestamp(), 'N', #{templateId}, #{des}, #{epoch}, #{learningRate}, #{batchSize}, #{searchMm});
mapper.update: update maummcc.LEARNING_SCHEDULER set SCHED_NM = #{schedNm}, HDQR_BOB_DCD = #{hdqrBobDcd}, TERM_TY = #{termTy}, ST_YMD = #{stYmd}, ST_TIME = #{stTime}, USE_AT = #{useAt}, MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = current_timestamp(), TEMPLATE_ID = #{templateId}, DES = #{des}, EPOCH = #{epoch}, LEARNING_RATE = #{learningRate}, BATCH_SIZE = #{batchSize}, SEARCH_MM = #{searchMm} where SCHED_ID = #{schedId};
update maummcc.LEARNING_SCHEDULER set DEL_AT = 'Y', MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = current_timestamp(), where SCHED_ID = #{schedId};
mapper.sql: ls.SCHED_ID , ls.SCHED_NM /*, ls.HDQR_BOB_DCD*/ , ls.USE_AT , ls.MOD_DT , ls.REG_ID , ls.REG_DT , ls.TEMPLATE_ID , ls.TERM_TY , ls.ST_YMD , ls.ST_TIME , ls.USE_AT , ls.TERM_TY , ls.ST_YMD , ls.ST_TIME , ls.USE_AT , ls.DES , ls.EPOCH , ls.LEARNING_RATE , ls.BATCH_SIZE , ls.SEARCH_MM , ls.RUN_CNT , ls.LATEST_RUN_DT
mapper.select:
select count(*) from LEARNING_SCHEDULER ls where ls.DEL_AT = 'N' and ls.TEMPLATE_ID in
#{item}
mapper.update:
update LEARNING_SCHEDULER ls set ls.DEL_AT = 'Y', ls.MOD_ID = #{memId}, ls.MOD_DT = current_timestamp() where ls.SCHED_ID in
#{item}
mapper.select:
SELECT
from LEARNING_SCHEDULER ls where ls.USE_AT = 'Y' and ls.DEL_AT = 'N' and DAYOFWEEK(now()) = DAYOFWEEK(ls.ST_YMD) and date_format(now(), '%H:%i') = time_format(ls.ST_TIME , '%H:%i')
